assignment.name: Grade Matrix
assignment.author: lognd
assignment.description: A small toolkit of numpy-only functions over a scores matrix (rows = students, columns = assignments): per-student and per-assignment means, curving a column to a target mean, dropping each student's lowest score, a passing-threshold boolean mask, and per-column standardization -- graded on exact vectorized behavior, with a hard constraint that forbids writing the logic as a Python loop.
